title: 151 Hard As Nails Essential Adhesive Mounting Tape, Double Sided
features: NO NEED FOR NAILS!: 151 Hard As Nails Adhesive Mounting Tape is reliable, super strength tape. Ready to use, cut to required length then peel and stick.

HEAVY DUTY DOUBLE SIDED TAPE: 151 Hard As Nails Mounting Tape, versatile for indoor and outdoor use. Suitable for mounting DIY & craft projects, including pictures, coat hooks, house numbers, number plates.
NO NAILS OR DRILLING REQUIRED: Quick and easy to use to bond items to a wall without drilling, nails or screws
SOLVENT FREE: 151 Hard As Nails Mounting Tape, free from solvents, ready to use. Prior to application, surfaces must be dry, clean and free from dust.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT. Ready to use double sided mounting tape. Store at room temperature
